## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. ...

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Package version: [e.g. 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, logs, or screenshots here.
